case_title: MICHIKO MASUDA VS. PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE INC

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MASUDA, MICHIKO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE INC JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HER BURDEN OF PROOF IN THAT SHE HAS NOT SHOWN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS LIABLE FOR THE LOST AND THE AMOUNT OF THE LOSS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MASUDA, MICHIKO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-25-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNCLAIMED. SENT TO DEFT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. PLAINTIFF APPEARED. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY. , NOT REPORTED (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK P. SCHREIBER FILED BY MASUDA, MICHIKO PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE INC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PUBLIC STORAGE FRANCHISE INC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED.HIROMI DUSKIN INTERPRETS ENGLISH/JAPANESE - JAPANESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
